violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Witnessed employee take out the trash and not wash hands after returning and putting on gloves.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. Establishment only had bottles of ready to use sanitizer and did not have a sanitizer to sanitize dishes in the three compartment sink.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Gloves and scratch pads were being stored in the hand sink.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A bag of onions was stored on the floor in the walk in cooler.
